infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Adventure Trip Planner uses your location to save trip destination coordinates and show them on the map.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Adventure Trip Planner uses the camera to capture photos for your trip gallery.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Adventure Trip Planner needs access to your photo library to upload trip photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Adventure Trip Planner uses your location to save trip destination coordinates and show them on the map.

plugins.photosPermission: Adventure Trip Planner needs access to your photo library to upload trip photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Adventure Trip Planner uses the camera to capture photos for your trip gallery.
